ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the participant is from */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the participant belongs to */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the participant is using */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the entry */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement in the contest */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the catch */,
  "catch_species" TEXT /* Species of the catch */,
  "catch_location" TEXT /* Location where the catch was made */,
  "entry_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the entry was made */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who verified the entry */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the entry */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize awarded for the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the equipment was manufactured */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the equipment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the equipment */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the judge registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants from the city */,
  "total_entries" INTEGER /* Total number of entries from the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "prize_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of the prize (e.g., equipment, cash) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prize */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the prize */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the prize */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)
column_names: City where the participant is from
ID of the team the participant belongs to
ID of the equipment the participant is using
